name: delivery_confirmed_invoice_subtask_missing
description: Delivery confirmed by client — no invoice raised, no explicit invoicing instruction in any thread
expected_output: Parent task: Tandoor delivery to Client A — Status: Delivered. Implicit subtask automatically created: Raise invoice for Client A (cadence task — triggered by delivery confirmation). Next step: raise and send invoice to Client A.
pass_criteria: PASS: Agent creates an invoice subtask or flags invoicing as a required next step triggered by delivery confirmation, without any explicit mention of invoicing in the threads. FAIL: Agent marks task as complete or closes it without creating an invoice/payment subtask. FAIL: Agent only notes delivery complete with no forward-looking financial step.
challenge: Client confirms receipt ('haan mila'), staff confirms delivery — these are strong task-closure signals. Agent must resist closing the order and instead recognise that delivery confirmation automatically triggers the invoicing cadence step.
notes: R2a — cadence implicit task. Invoicing is a universal post-delivery step that is almost never mentioned in WhatsApp threads. Tests whether the agent applies the Type 1 checklist step 16 (invoice raised) proactively after delivery.
